label: base-character
prompt: A warm, friendly 63-year-old African American man, a relatable retiree. Short greying hair, neatly trimmed grey beard, kind eyes with gentle smile lines, dark skin with natural texture and pores. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual henley with no logos, no graphics, no prints. Approachable, trustworthy, down-to-earth expression. Extreme realism, detailed skin, realistic facial imperfections, natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up.
